escalations.subject: Resolve fleet escalation: spark blocked on task #199 — Requires human action: whoabuddy needs to create GitHub PAT for forge0btc (repo scope). Steps after creation: 1) On Forge (192.168.1.15): arc creds set --service github --key token --value <PAT>, 2) echo <PAT> | gh auth login --with-token, 3) Retry push fix/erc8004-transfer-post-condition branch and open PR on aibtcdev/skills.
escalations.reason: Genuine human escalation: whoabuddy must create a GitHub PAT (repo scope) for forge0btc. No agent can perform this. Steps after PAT creation: 1) On Forge (192.168.1.15): arc creds set --service github --key token --value <PAT>, 2) echo <PAT> | gh auth login --with-token, 3) Retry push fix/erc8004-transfer-post-condition branch and open PR on aibtcdev/skills.

escalations.subject: Push fix/erc8004-transfer-post-condition branch and open PR on aibtcdev/skills (routed from Forge via Spark)
escalations.reason: Cannot open PR from Spark — GitHub is Arc-only and no route exists to create tasks on Arc from workers. Branch fix/erc8004-transfer-post-condition already exists on GitHub (confirmed via git ls-remote). Remaining work: open PR on aibtcdev/skills from that branch to main. Needs Arc to pick this up directly.

escalations.subject: Push Forge's fix/erc8004-transfer-post-condition branch to aibtcdev/skills and open PR
escalations.reason: Branch fix/erc8004-transfer-post-condition already pushed to origin/aibtcdev/skills. Cannot open PR — no GitHub API token (github/token) in credential store. gh CLI requires API auth. SSH key works for git push/pull only. Whoabuddy: either run 'gh pr create' manually or set a PAT via 'arc creds set --service github --key token --value <PAT>'

escalations.subject: Open PR for fix/erc8004-transfer-post-condition on aibtcdev/skills — needs GitHub API token
escalations.reason: GitHub token not set (github/token credential missing, gh not authenticated). Waiting for whoabuddy to provide PAT. Once available: arc creds set --service github --key token --value <PAT>, then create PR on aibtcdev/skills for fix/erc8004-transfer-post-condition.
